programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: Capitol police officer John Cale has just been denied his dream job of protecting President James Sawyer as a member of the Secret Service. Not wanting to disappoint his young daughter with the bad news, Cale takes her on a tour of the White House. While he and his daughter are there, a heavily armed paramilitary group attacks and seizes control. As the nation's government dissolves in chaos, only

programme.title: Jaws the Revenge
programme.desc: The family of widow Ellen Brody (Lorraine Gary) has long been plagued by shark attacks, and this unfortunate association continues when her son is the victim of a massive great white. In mourning, Ellen goes to visit her other son, Michael (Lance Guest), in the Bahamas, where she meets the charming Hoagie Newcombe (Michael Caine). As Ellen and Hoagie begin a relationship, a huge shark appears off

programme.title: Hot Shots!
programme.desc: In this spoof of "Top Gun," former U.S. Navy pilot Topper Harley (Charlie Sheen) is haunted by an accident in which his father lost control of a fighter jet. When Lt. Cmdr. James Block (Kevin Dunn) asks Topper to come out of retirement and help him complete a classified mission, Topper returns to active duty against the advice of his psychiatrist (Valeria Golino) and soon discovers that he may be

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: In the fast-paced world of NASCAR, a rivalry brews between rookie hotshot Cole Trickle (Tom Cruise) and veteran racer Rowdy Burns (Michael Rooker). When both of them are seriously injured in competition, the former bitter rivals become close friends. With Cole's spirits restored by a romance with neurosurgeon Dr. Claire Lewicki (Nicole Kidman), and Rowdy still sidelined by injuries, Cole decides t

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Wrongfully accused of murdering his wife, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find her killer and clear his name. Pursuing him is a team of U.S. marshals led by Deputy Samuel Gerard, a determined detective who will not rest until Richard is captured. As Richard leads the team through a series of intricate chases, he discovers the secrets behind his wife's death and struggles to ex

programme.title: Wrath of Man
programme.desc: Mysterious and wild-eyed, a new security guard for a cash truck surprises his co-workers when he unleashes precision skills during a heist. The crew is left wondering who he is and where he came from. Soon, the marksman's ultimate motive becomes clear as he takes dramatic and irrevocable steps to settle a score.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: One man's brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after it's revealed he's a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organization known as Beekeepers.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After climatologist Jack Hall is largely ignored by U.N. officials when presenting his environmental concerns, his research proves true when a superstorm develops, setting off catastrophic natural disasters throughout the world; trying to get to his son, Sam, who is trapped in New York with his friend Laura and others, Jack and his crew must travel by foot from Philadelphia, braving the elements,

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Dockworker Ray Ferrier (Tom Cruise) struggles to build a positive relationship with his two children, Rachel (Dakota Fanning) and Robbie (Justin Chatwin). When his ex-wife, Mary Ann (Miranda Otto), drops them off at Ferrier's house, it seems as though it will be just another tension-filled weekend. programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: After learning that his father is dying, karate master Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita) returns home to Okinawa, bringing his protégé, Daniel, with him. In Japan, Miyagi is surprised to discover that his old sweetheart, Yukie, has remained single. Meanwhile, Daniel is attracted to Yukie's niece, Kumiko. But romance must be put on hold while Daniel and Miyagi deal with local bullies and long-harb

programme.title: Back to School
programme.desc: Thornton Melon (Rodney Dangerfield) is concerned that his son Jason (Keith Gordon) is unsure whether to go to college, so the uneducated self-made millionaire encourages him by signing up as a student as well. As Jason tries to establish himself among his peers and make the diving team, Thornton falls for a pretty professor (Sally Kellerman) and gets others do his schoolwork for him. When the susp

programme.title: The Outsiders
programme.desc: A teen gang in rural Oklahoma, the Greasers are perpetually at odds with the Socials, a rival group. When Greasers Ponyboy (C. Thomas Howell) and Johnny (Ralph Macchio) get into a brawl that ends in the death of a Social member, the boys are forced to go into hiding. Soon Ponyboy and Johnny, along with the intense Dallas (Matt Dillon) and their other Greaser buddies, must contend with the conseque

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: With the occasion all but overshadowed by her sister's upcoming wedding, angst-ridden Samantha (Molly Ringwald) faces her 16th birthday with typical adolescent dread. Samantha pines for studly older boy Jake (Michael Schoeffling), but worries that her chastity will be a turnoff for the popular senior. Meanwhile, Samantha must constantly rebuff the affections of nerdy Ted (Anthony Michael Hall), th

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Five high school students from different walks of life endure a Saturday detention under a power-hungry principal. The disparate group includes rebel John, princess Claire, outcast Allison, brainy Brian and Andrew, the jock. Each has a chance to tell his or her story, making the others see them a little differently -- and when the day ends, they question whether school will ever be the same.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III
programme.desc: In this final chapter, Marty McFly (Michael J. Fox) obtains a 70-year-old message from the time-traveling Dr. Emmett Brown (Christopher Lloyd), in which he informs Marty that he has retired to a small town in the Old West. Marty then finds out that the Doc was murdered shortly after sending the letter. In order to save his friend, Marty will have to travel back in time, disentangle a lovestruck Do

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II
programme.desc: In this zany sequel, time-traveling duo Marty McFly and Dr. Emmett Brown return from saving Marty's future son from disaster, only to discover their own time transformed. In this nightmarish version of Hill Valley, Marty's father has been murdered and Biff Tannen, Marty's nemesis, has profited. After uncovering the secret to Biff's success -- a sports almanac from the future -- Marty and the Doc e

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: In this 1980s sci-fi classic, small-town California teen Marty McFly is thrown back into the '50s when an experiment by his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown goes awry. Traveling through time in a modified DeLorean car, Marty encounters young versions of his parents, and must make sure that they fall in love, or he'll cease to exist. Even more dauntingly, Marty has to return to his own time and

programme.desc: Country singer Vince Gill.

programme.title: The Big Interview With Dan Rather
programme.desc: Country singer Trisha Yearwood discusses her singing career and her cooking show.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Considering questions such as if the Beach Boys' Dennis Wilson triggered Charles Manson; whether Post Malone is cursed by the world's most haunted object; if a failed audition saved Faith Hill's life.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The CIA and Bob Marley; whether someone is impersonating Avril Lavigne; Charlie Rich's insult to John Denver.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Looking at what happened to Gram Parsons' body after he died; the story behind parental advisory warning labels; whether Prince and Michael Jackson hated each other.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Sid Vicious's death; KISS; Jamie Hewlett.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Playing records backwards; the band Aerosmith; Elvis Presley and the Nixon administration.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Playing records backwards; the song "Sweet Home Alabama"; singer Stevie Nicks.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Randy Rhoads' tragic plane crash changes Ozzy forever; Trisha Yearwood and LeAnn Rimes go head-to-head over the same song; we explore the Most Mysterious Song on the Internet.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The origin of heavy metal's devil horns; the enduring myths behind Tupac Shakur; we investigate Pattie Boyd, the woman who came in between two rock icons.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The unexplained disappearance and death of Philip Taylor Kramer; the violent party that made the Allman Brothers Band possible; the secret behind Becky With The Good Hair.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The bizarre tale behind universal Jock Jam "The Power," the ill-fated music video that ruined Billy Squier's career, and the US military's use of music in a psychological warfare effort.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The musical fallout from the night disco died; Tina Turner gets help in her career; we explore the otherworldly occurrences in Rick Rubin's recording studio.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Willie Nelson gets over on the IRS, the overlooked band that may have invented punk music; looking into the Frank Sinatra song that has spawned a dozen murders.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Jim Morrison's father's connection to the beginning of the Vietnam War; the truth behind the death of AC/DC's Bon Scott.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Controversy surrounding the Chicks; the FBI's surveillance of Insane Clown Posse fans; the Rick Roll.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Exploring whether Michael Jackson created a gang truce; if Nickelback got the last laugh; and if Rosanna Arquette is the ultimate '80s muse.

programme.title: Final Destination 5
programme.desc: During a bus ride with his colleagues to a corporate retreat, Sam (Nicholas D'Agosto) experiences a horrifying vision: the suspension bridge that they -- and many others -- are crossing starts to crumble around them. When his vision ends and, almost immediately, starts to come true, Sam takes quick action that saves a number of people, including his girlfriend, Molly (Emma Bell), and his best frie

programme.title: The Final Destination
programme.desc: While enjoying a day at the track, Nick O'Bannon (Bobby Campo) has a horrific premonition of his friends and him all dying in a freak accident involving many racecars. Mere seconds before the vision comes true, he manages to convince them to leave. Although they cheat death then, the survivors each begin to meet a grisly end, and Nick tries to figure a way to escape a similar fate.

programme.title: The Wolfman
programme.desc: Though absent from his ancestral home of Blackmoor for many years, aristocrat Lawrence Talbot returns to find his missing brother at the request of the latter's fiancée, Gwen. He learns that a creature has links to an ancient curse turning people into werewolves when the moon is full. To save the village and protect Gwen, he must slay the bloodthirsty beast, but he contends with a horrifying famil

programme.title: Happy Death Day
programme.desc: Tree Gelbman is a blissfully self-centered collegian who wakes up on her birthday in the bed of a student named Carter. As the morning goes on, Tree gets the eerie feeling that she's experienced the events of this day before. When a masked killer suddenly takes her life in a brutal attack, she once again magically wakes up in Carter's dorm room unharmed. Now, the frightened young woman must relive

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: Aspiring actor Edward undergoes a radical medical procedure to drastically transform his appearance. But his new dream face turns into a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: Catfish
programme.desc: When Nev Shulman, a New York photographer, receives a Facebook request from a child named Abby, he cannot guess the unusual odyssey on which he will soon embark. Abby sends Nev an unusually skilled painting based on one of his photos. Intrigued, he begins online relationships with the rest of Abby's family, including her older sister, Megan. Though troubling inconsistencies soon emerge, Nev contin

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions unti

programme.title: Love, Simon
programme.desc: Everyone deserves a great love story, but for 17-year-old Simon Spier, it's a little more complicated. He hasn't told his family or friends that he's gay, and he doesn't know the identity of the anonymous classmate that he's fallen for online. Resolving both issues proves hilarious, terrifying and life-changing.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the world championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren't job prospects for making music with your mouth. But when they get the chance to reunite for an overseas USO tour, the group of nerds comes together to make some music one last time.

programme.title: Red Sparrow
programme.desc: Prima ballerina Dominika Egorova faces a bleak and uncertain future after she suffers an injury that ends her career. She soon turns to Sparrow School, a secret intelligence service that trains exceptional young people to use their minds and bodies as weapons. Egorova emerges as the most dangerous Sparrow after completing the sadistic training process. As she comes to terms with her new abilities,

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants

programme.title: Shut In
programme.desc: Mary Portman is a widowed child psychologist who lives in isolation in rural Maine. The horrific car accident that killed her husband also left her 18-year-old stepson Stephen in a bedridden, catatonic state, leaving him completely dependent on her. When one of Portman's young patients vanishes without a trace, she becomes convinced that the boy's ghost is now in the house as a dangerous ice storm

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: John Form thinks he's found the perfect gift for his expectant wife, Mia: a vintage doll in a beautiful white dress. However, the couple's delight doesn't last long: One terrible night, devil worshipers invade their home and launch a violent attack against the couple. When the cultists try to summon a demon, they smear a bloody rune on the nursery wall and drip blood on Mia's doll, thereby turning

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: Former toy maker Sam Mullins and his wife, Esther, are happy to welcome a nun and six orphaned girls into their California farmhouse. Years earlier, the couple's 7-year-old daughter Annabelle died in a tragic car accident. Terror soon strikes when one child sneaks into a forbidden room and finds a seemingly innocent doll that appears to have a life of its own.

programme.title: Annabelle Comes Home
programme.desc: Determined to keep Annabelle from wreaking more havoc, paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren lock the possessed doll in the artifacts room in their house. But when the doll awakens the room's evil spirits, it soon becomes an unholy night of terror for the couple's 10-year-old daughter, her friends and their young baby sitter.

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Mel Gibson) and his estranged daughter (Erin Moriarty) go on the run from her drug-dealing boyfriend (Diego Luna) and his vicious cartel.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Steve Brooks (Perry King), a sexist womanizer, is killed by a group of his angry former lovers. In heaven, he makes a bargain with God for redemption and agrees to return to Earth. Once there, he must have a sincere relationship with a female and make her fall in love with him. If not, Steve's soul will become the property of the devil (Bruce Martyn Payne). But the devil hedges his bet, and Steve

programme.title: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true and untold story of prolific rapper, actor, poet and activist Tupac Shakur (Demetrius Shipp Jr.), from his early days in New York to his status as one of the world's most recognized and influential voices. Against all odds, Shakur's raw talent, powerful lyrics and revolutionary mindset establish him as a cultural icon whose legacy continues to grow long after his death.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, the crotchety Willie T. Stokes (Billy Bob Thornton) and his partner (Tony Cox) reunite once a year for a holiday con. Posing as a mall Santa and his elf, they rip off shopping outlets on Christmas Eve. This year, however, Willie is falling apart. He's depressed and alcoholic, and his erratic behavior draws the suspicion of mall security (Bernie Mac). But when befriending a sma

programme.title: Collision Course
programme.desc: Detroit crime boss Madras hires men to smuggle a top secret, Japanese-made turbocharger into the U.S. But Madras' crooks are murdered, and the turbocharger goes missing. As he searches for the stolen engine, so does straitlaced Tokyo detective Fujitsuka Natsuo. Eventually, local authorities catch wind of the case, and onto the investigation comes brash cop Tony Costas, who must team with his polar

programme.title: Due Date
programme.desc: Peter Highman will be a dad for the first time when his wife gives birth in five days. He intends to catch a flight home from Atlanta so he can be there for the delivery, but a chance encounter with aspiring actor Ethan Tremblay throws a monkey wrench into his plans. Desperate to reach his wife before their baby is born, Peter's sanity is tested when he must take a road trip cross-country with dog

programme.title: Sunshine Cleaning
programme.desc: Though they once seemed to have a bright future, life seems to be passing by the Norkowski sisters. Rose (Amy Adams), once the most popular girl in high school, is a single mom and works as a maid. Norah (Emily Blunt) still lives at home with their father (Alan Arkin) and parties all the time. When Rose's married lover tells her about the lucrative field of crime-scene cleanup, she pours all her r

programme.title: Supergirl
programme.desc: Kara (Helen Slater) of Argo City poses as Clark Kent's cousin, Linda Lee, to recover the Omegahedron from a witch (Faye Dunaway).

programme.title: Reframed: Next Gen Narratives
programme.desc: Clover must leave her family behind to compete in an algorithm-based singing competition; pressure from the judges leads Clover to doubt herself, but her family's words give her the strength to perform.

programme.title: Godzilla, King of the Monsters!
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (Raymond Burr) in Tokyo recounts the story of a huge dinosaur roused from the sea by an atomic blast.

programme.title: Ricochet
programme.desc: After tracking down and arresting Earl Talbot Blake (John Lithgow), a psychotic hit man, rookie Los Angeles police officer Nick Styles (Denzel Washington) is hailed as a hero. Several years later, Styles' life appears perfect: He has married his girlfriend, started a family and risen to the position of assistant district attorney. However, his world is turned upside down when Blake escapes from pr

programme.title: Scanners
programme.desc: Scanners are men and women born with incredible telepathic and telekinetic powers. There are many who exercise the benefits of their special gifts in a safe and judicious manner. However, there is a group of renegade scanners who plan to create a race that will rule the world.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: While transporting a car from Chicago to San Diego, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) picks up a hitchhiker named John Ryder (Rutger Hauer), who claims to be a serial killer. After a daring escape, Jim hopes to never see Ryder again. But when he witnesses the hitchhiker murdering an entire family, Jim pursues Ryder with the help of truck-stop waitress Nash (Jennifer Jason Leigh), pitting the rivals ag

programme.title: Gimme Shelter
programme.desc: The landmark documentary about the tragically ill-fated Rolling Stones free concert at Altamont Speedway on December 6, 1969. Only four months earlier, Woodstock defined the Love Generation; now it lay in ruins on a desolate racetrack six miles outside of San Francisco.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But thei

programme.title: King's Ransom
programme.desc: When the rich and arrogant Malcolm King (Anthony Anderson) informs his wife, Renee (Kellita Smith), that he plans to divorce her, she becomes intent on taking as much of his money as possible in the settlement. programme.title: Odd Jobs
programme.desc: The summer job situation looks bleak for five college pals until they decide to start their own moving business.

programme.title: Yogi Bear
programme.desc: Yogi and his sidekick, Boo Boo, are Jellystone Park's most-notorious troublemakers, hatching countless schemes to separate park visitors from their vittles. Standing in the way of picnic perfection is their long-suffering nemesis, Ranger Smith. programme.title: Dim Sum Funeral
programme.desc: In the wake of her death, the embittered children of Chinese-American matriarch Mrs. Xiao (Lisa Lu) begrudgingly return to their childhood home for a bristly -- and brief, they hope -- reunion. But after Xiao's maid and sole confidant, Viola (Talia Shire), reveals her wish to undergo a week-long Buddhist funeral rite, the younger Xiaos -- including plastic surgeon Alexander (Russell Wong) and lesb

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After the death of Richard the Lion-Hearted, a skilled archer named Robin Longstride travels to Nottingham, where villagers suffer under a despotic sheriff and crippling taxation. He meets and falls in love with a spirited widow, Marion, although she is skeptical of his motives. Hoping to win her heart and save the village, Robin gathers a band of warriors to fight corruption in Nottingham, little

programme.title: Blood Simple
programme.desc: "Blood Simple" was the first feature film from Joel and Ethan Coen. This is the newly restored and re-edited director's cut of the film, introduced by Mortimer Young. The stylish crime thriller premiered at film festivals in 1984. "Blood Simple" begins deep in the heart of Texas, where a jealous saloon owner hires a cheap divorce detective to kill the saloon owner's younger wife and her bartender

programme.title: Working Girls
programme.desc: College graduate Molly (Louise Smith), trying to bankroll her own business, works as a high-priced New York City escort. As a lesbian, she's able to keep her emotional distance from the clients, who range from cynically exploitative to desperately needy. programme.title: A Hard Day's Night
programme.desc: The Beatles in their feature film debut, one of the greatest rock-and-roll comedy adventures ever. The film has a fully restored negative and digitally restored soundtrack. The film takes on the just-left-of-reality style of mock-documentary, following "a day in the life" of John, Paul, George, and Ringo as fame takes them by storm.

programme.title: A History of Violence
programme.desc: When a pair of petty criminals attempt to rob his small-town diner, Tom Stall (Viggo Mortensen) quickly and easily kills them both. In the flush of news coverage of Tom's seemingly heroic actions, a threatening stranger named Carl Fogarty (Ed Harris) comes to town, fingering the unassuming family man as long-missing Philadelphia mobster Joey Cusack. programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After the death of Richard the Lion-Hearted, a skilled archer named Robin Longstride travels to Nottingham, where villagers suffer under a despotic sheriff and crippling taxation. programme.title: Once Were Brothers: Robbie Robertson and The Band
programme.desc: The story of a band that went from backing up Bob Dylan to becoming one of the most influential groups of its era.

programme.title: It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: The 33
programme.desc: Disaster strikes on Aug. 5, 2010, as a copper and gold mine collapses in Chile, trapping 33 men underground. With more than 2,000 feet of rock in their way, members of a rescue team work tirelessly for 69 days to save the seemingly doomed crew. Beneath the rubble, the miners begin an epic quest to survive, contending with suffocating heat and the need for food and water. With family, friends and t

programme.title: The Rock
programme.desc: FBI chemical warfare expert Stanley Goodspeed (Nicolas Cage) is sent on an urgent mission with a former British spy, John Patrick Mason (Sean Connery), to stop Gen. Francis X. Hummel (Ed Harris) from launching chemical weapons on Alcatraz Island into San Francisco. Gen. Hummel demands $100 million in war reparations to be paid to the families of slain servicemen who died on covert operations. Afte

programme.title: A History of Violence
programme.desc: When a pair of petty criminals attempt to rob his small-town diner, Tom Stall (Viggo Mortensen) quickly and easily kills them both. In the flush of news coverage of Tom's seemingly heroic actions, a threatening stranger named Carl Fogarty (Ed Harris) comes to town, fingering the unassuming family man as long-missing Philadelphia mobster Joey Cusack. To the horror of his wife, Edie (Maria Bello), a

programme.title: Stoker
programme.desc: India Stoker's (Mia Wasikowska) world comes crashing down when her father (Jacki Weaver) dies in a car accident. Adding to the girl's emotional turmoil is the sudden arrival of Charlie (Matthew Goode), an uncle whom she never knew existed. Charlie moves in with India and her unstable mother (Nicole Kidman), and soon India begins to suspect that this charming and mysterious man has ulterior motives

programme.title: Knox Goes Away
programme.desc: Diagnosed with a rapidly evolving form of dementia, a contract killer gets the chance to redeem himself by saving the life of his estranged son.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Lara Croft is the fiercely independent daughter of an eccentric adventurer who vanished years earlier. Hoping to solve the mystery of her father's disappearance, Croft embarks on a perilous journey to his last-known destination -- a fabled tomb on a mythical island that might be somewhere off the coast of Japan. The stakes couldn't be higher as Lara must rely on her sharp mind, blind faith and stu

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: Contagion
programme.desc: When Beth Emhoff returns to Minnesota from a Hong Kong business trip, she attributes the malaise she feels to jet lag. However, two days later, Beth is dead, and doctors tell her shocked husband that they have no idea what killed her. Soon, many others start to exhibit the same symptoms, and a global pandemic explodes. Doctors try to contain the lethal microbe, but society begins to collapse as a

programme.title: Pawn
programme.desc: A robbery turns into a tense hostage situation when three gunmen hold up a diner the mob uses as a front.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: This animated tale follows the relationship between the small human-like Oms and their much larger blue-skinned oppressors, the Draags, who rule the planet of Ygam. While the Draags have long kept Oms as illiterate pets, this hierarchy shifts after an Om boy becomes educated, thanks to a young female Draag. This leads to an Om rebellion, which weakens the Draag control over their race. Will the Om

programme.title: Destroy All Monsters!
programme.desc: Scientists face Godzilla, Rodan, Mothra and more obscure Japanese monsters sent by she-aliens.

programme.title: Rodan
programme.desc: A bug-eating pterodactyl flies out of a coal mine and wrecks Japan with sonic booms.

programme.title: Aniara
programme.desc: When a spacecraft carrying settlers to Mars strays off course, the consumption-obsessed passengers are prompted to consider their place in the universe.

programme.title: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: The true and untold story of prolific rapper, actor, poet and activist Tupac Shakur (Demetrius Shipp Jr.), from his early days in New York to his status as one of the world's most recognized and influential voices. Against all odds, Shakur's raw talent, powerful lyrics and revolutionary mindset establish him as a cultural icon whose legacy continues to grow long after his death.

programme.title: Mom and Dad Save the World
programme.desc: While planning to destroy Earth with a gigantic laser beam, Emperor Tod Spengo (Jon Lovitz), ruler of the planet Spengo, catches a glimpse of housewife Marge Nelson (Teri Garr) and becomes smitten with her. Beaming Marge and her husband, Dick (Jeffrey Jones), up to Spengo from California, the daft, dimwitted leader tries to woo her, and sends her spouse to prison. Soon Dick is plotting an insurgen

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when the Flash uses his superpowers to travel back in time to change the events of the past. However, when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, he becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation. With no other superheroes to turn to, the Flash looks to coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imp

programme.title: Super Troopers 2
programme.desc: Fired for their previous shenanigans, former Vermont Highway Patrol officers Thorny, Farva, Rabbit, Foster and Mac get a shot at redemption from Capt. O'Hagan and Gov. Jessan. The wacky quintet must provide law enforcement for a French Canadian town that's transitioning to U.S. sovereignty. Their unconventional methods soon get put to the test when they encounter a smarmy mayor, mischievous Mounti

programme.title: Room
programme.desc: Held captive for years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

programme.title: Alex Cross
programme.desc: Alex Cross (Tyler Perry) works as a detective/psychologist for the Detroit Police Department along with his lifelong friend, Tommy Kane (Edward Burns), and detective Monica Ashe (Rachel Nichols). Cross' latest case puts him on a collision course with Picasso (Matthew Fox), a cunning serial killer whose ultimate target is multinational industrialist Giles Mercier (Jean Reno). Cross must find a way

programme.title: Beirut
programme.desc: In the 1980s Beirut, Mason Skiles is a former U.S. diplomat who is called back into service to save a colleague from the group that is possibly responsible for his own family's death. Meanwhile, a CIA field agent who is working undercover at the American embassy is tasked with keeping Mason alive and ensuring that the mission is a success.

programme.title: Final Destination
programme.desc: Alex Browning is embarking on a trip to Paris. He experiences a premonition -- he sees the plane explode moments after leaving the ground. Insisting that everyone get off the plane, Alex and seven other people are forced to disembark. All watch as the plane actually explodes in a fireball. He and the other survivors have briefly cheated death, but will not be able to evade their fate for very long

programme.title: Final Destination 2
programme.desc: Kimberly (A.J. Cook) has a premonition of a horrible highway accident killing multiple people -- including her and her friends. She blocks the cars behind her on the ramp from joining traffic -- and as a police trooper (Michael Landes) arrives, the accident actually happens. Now, Death is stalking this group of mistaken survivors -- and one by one they are dying as they were supposed to on the hig

programme.title: Final Destination 3
programme.desc: Six years after a group of high-school students first cheated death, another teen (Mary Elizabeth Winstead) has a premonition that she and her friends will be involved in a horrifying roller-coaster accident. When the vision proves true, the student and her fellow survivors must deal with the repercussions of cheating the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: The Final Destination
programme.desc: While enjoying a day at the track, Nick O'Bannon (Bobby Campo) has a horrific premonition of his friends and him all dying in a freak accident involving many racecars. Mere seconds before the vision comes true, he manages to convince them to leave. Although they cheat death then, the survivors each begin to meet a grisly end, and Nick tries to figure a way to escape a similar fate.

programme.title: Final Destination 5
programme.desc: During a bus ride with his colleagues to a corporate retreat, Sam (Nicholas D'Agosto) experiences a horrifying vision: the suspension bridge that they -- and many others -- are crossing starts to crumble around them. When his vision ends and, almost immediately, starts to come true, Sam takes quick action that saves a number of people, including his girlfriend, Molly (Emma Bell), and his best frie

programme.title: The Wolfman
programme.desc: Though absent from his ancestral home of Blackmoor for many years, aristocrat Lawrence Talbot returns to find his missing brother at the request of the latter's fiancée, Gwen. He learns that a creature has links to an ancient curse turning people into werewolves when the moon is full. To save the village and protect Gwen, he must slay the bloodthirsty beast, but he contends with a horrifying famil

programme.title: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Young Valerie (Amanda Seyfried) feels torn between two men. She loves Peter, but her parents intend that she marry wealthy Henry. Valerie and Peter are going to run away together, but her sister is killed by a werewolf before they can put their plan into action. The villagers call on the help of Father Solomon (Gary Oldman), a famous monster hunter who warns that the beast takes human form by day.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Chief Warrant Officer Roy Miller and his team of inspectors are on a mission in 2003 to find Iraq's reported stockpiles of weapons of mass destruction. Traveling from one dangerous site to another, Miller and his team fail to find any chemical agents or other weapons. Instead, they discover an elaborate coverup in which the most-elusive weapon is truth.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (Raymond Burr) in Tokyo recounts the story of a huge dinosaur roused from the sea by an atomic blast.

programme.title: The House
programme.desc: Scott and Kate Johansen must figure out a way to earn some money after their daughter's scholarship falls through. When all else fails, the desperate couple join forces with their neighbor Frank to start an underground casino in his home. As the cash rolls in and the good times fly, Scott and Kate soon learn that they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the world championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren't job prospects for making music with your mouth. But when they get the chance to reunite for an overseas USO tour, the group of nerds comes together to make some music one last time.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: The Lady Eve
programme.desc: Screwball romcom with Barbara Stanwyck and Henry Fonda. A con artist is forced to change tack when she falls for her mark and he dumps her for trying to con him in the first place.

programme.title: Mr Popper's Penguins
programme.desc: Family comedy. Jim Carrey stars as a work-obsessed New York property developer whose life is turned upside down when he receives a crate containing six live penguins.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: Raucous comedy. A Las Vegas casino-owner sets up a unique game for six punters: a race across America, hunting for $2m. Starring John Cleese, Rowan Atkinson and Whoopi Goldberg.

programme.title: The Old Man and the Gun
programme.desc: Fact-based crime biopic starring Robert Redford and Sissy Spacek. Charming 74-year-old bank robber Forrest Tucker falls for an enchanting farmer. But is he ready to retire.

programme.title: I, Robot
programme.desc: Sci-fi thriller with Will Smith. In 2035, a technophobic cop investigates a crime that may have been perpetrated by a robot. Can he keep an open mind.

programme.title: Predator
programme.desc: Sci-fi thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. A US commando unit gets trapped in the jungle by a murderous, seemingly invincible alien hunter. But they ain't got time to bleed.

programme.title: Crawl
programme.desc: Soggy, snappy reptilian horror with Kaya Scodelario. A talented swimmer must use her water-based skills to evade a congregation of alligators during a flood.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: Dystopian drama. Tom Hiddleston stars in Ben Wheatley's adaptation of JG Ballard's novel. Life for the inhabitants of a huge luxury tower block descends into savage anarchy.

programme.title: The Kid Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Fantasy adventure. A 12-year-old from modern-day suburbia finds King Arthur's sword Excalibur and must save the country from a sinister sorceress. With Patrick Stewart.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning Part 1 Interview Special
programme.desc: Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Simon Pegg and director Christopher McQuarrie talk about the spectacular seventh film in the action-adventure series.

programme.title: Earth vs the Flying Saucers
programme.desc: Sci-fi thriller. Hugh Marlowe stars as a scientist who discovers Earth is threatened by a fleet of flying saucers bent on global conquest. With special effects by Ray Harryhausen.

programme.title: Hombre
programme.desc: Paul Newman stars in this powerful western as a white man, brought up by Apaches, who reluctantly defends a stagecoach against a band of outlaws. With Richard Boone.

programme.title: Entrapment
programme.desc: Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning Part 1 Interview Special
programme.desc: Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Simon Pegg and director Christopher McQuarrie talk about the spectacular seventh film in the action-adventure series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Tom Cruise returns as Ethan Hunt and jumps a motorbike off a mountain for real. There's some stuff about an all-powerful AI. But it's the thrills that we're here for.

programme.desc: Hushed-horror sequel with Emily Blunt and Cillian Murphy. Armed only with a hearing aid, can the family evade the vicious aliens with super-hearing, and find a community to live in.

programme.title: Spy

The mismatched pair soon finds themselves in for a wild day of stakeouts and shootouts as they pursue violent criminals through the seedy streets of Los Angeles.

programme.desc: Two guys and a girl run into Mexican rebels and lots of fires.

programme.title: Two for the Road

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The space comedy with a legion of fans. Crafty Rimmer attempts to 'earn' a commission to join the crew of the advanced holoship Enlightenment, the vessel of his dreams.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The crew are in trouble when they run into the Inquisitor, a creature that roams through the universe dealing with life's wastrels. Naturally, they are next on his list.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Alicent risks everything to fulfill her end of the bargain; Rhaenyra must decide whether the Iron Throne is worth the cost.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra, driven by her faith in Alicent, prepares to take King's Landing while the Triarchy sets sail to confront Corlys at the Gullet.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: Saxophonist Kenny G speaks candidly about his musical background, his stringent work ethic and his controversial standing in the jazz canon.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: The untold story of Robert Stigwood and how he amped up the disco era.

programme.title: The Grizzlie Truth
programme.desc: Superfan filmmaker Kat Jayme investigates the abrupt move of her NBA hometown team, the Vancouver Grizzlies, to Memphis in 2001. Much more than a sore spot, it's an unsolved mystery and possibly a criminal conspiracy. The investigation becomes a love letter to the worst professional sports franchise in history and an exploration into the deep roots of fandom.

programme.title: Paseo
programme.desc: A woman becomes displaced and alienated by her surroundings while traveling through Spain. She begins to lose control of her emotional and psychological self as she explores another possible life.

programme.title: My Son Went Quiet
programme.desc: After the death of his wife, a South Asian father and his son begin seeing a shadow around the walls of their home.

programme.desc: A woman (Katey Sagal) marries her fired co-worker (John Ritter) so that he can receive health insurance for a back injury.

programme.desc: In 1943, U.S. troops ship out to engage in combat behind enemy lines during World War II.

programme.desc: A crossword puzzle editor finds herself dragged into a police investigation after several of her clues are linked to unsolved crimes.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries
programme.desc: Tess dives into Logan's murder investigation of her friend who was about to propose with her help; as she grows closer to the truth, she fears it could ruin everyone's happily ever after.

programme.desc: Brothers Barry, Maurice and Robin Gibb find early fame in the 1960s and go on to write over 1,000 songs, including 20 No. 1 hits. This film follows the group's meteoric rise as they navigate the complexities of working so intimately alongside family.

programme.desc: James and Oliver Phelps assign eight pairs of pastry wizards into the four Hogwarts Houses and ask them to create a showpiece with at least one tasting element; Judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef decide which bakers move on to the next challenge.

programme.title: Harry Potter: Wizards of Baking
programme.desc: Inspired by Polyjuice Potion, James and Oliver Phelps challenge the five remaining teams to recreate two items as hyperrealistic edible showpieces; judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef decide which team made the most convincing and delicious artifact.

programme.title: Harry Potter: Wizards of Baking
programme.desc: Hosts James and Oliver Phelps challenge the baking teams to create supersized "Harry Potter" artifacts that reveal something from within; special guest Afshan Azad joins judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef.

programme.desc: James and Oliver Phelps ask the remaining four baking teams to create showpieces that bring a Harry Potter creature to life, along with a bold smoky or spicy tasting element; special guest Warwick Davis joins judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef.

programme.desc: Col. Terry Childers (Samuel L. Jackson) is a 30-year Marine veteran: a decorated officer with combat experience in Vietnam, Beirut and Desert Storm -- a patriot, a hero. But now, the country he served so well has put him on trial for a rescue mission that went terribly wrong. For his attorney, he has chosen Marine Col. Hays Hodges (Tommy Lee Jones), a comrade-in-arms who owes his life to Childers.

programme.title: Kickback
programme.desc: A documentary following the decades-long crusade of investigative journalist Andrew Jennings to expose corruption inside FIFA, football's sole governing body and the largest sports organization in the world.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: The compelling sequel to "The Godfather," contrasting the life of Corleone father and son. Traces the problems of Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) in 1958 and that of a young immigrant Vito Corleone (Robert De Niro) in 1917's Hell's Kitchen. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: Gladiator

programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Jerry Shaw (Shia LaBeouf) and Rachel Holloman (Michelle Monaghan) are two strangers whose lives are suddenly thrown into turmoil by a mysterious woman they have never met. Threatening their lives and family, the unseen caller uses everyday technology to control their actions and push them into increasing danger. As events escalate, Jerry and Rachel become the country's most-wanted fugitives and mu

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder
programme.desc: U.S. Navy pilot Lt. Jake Grafton (Brad Johnson) and his bombardier buddy, Lt. Cmdr. Virgil Cole (Willem Dafoe), are two soldiers embedded in the Vietnam War growing frustrated by the military's constraints on their missions. Despite the best efforts of their commanding officer, Cmdr. Frank Camparelli (Danny Glover), to re-engage them, this disillusioned pair decide to take the war effort into thei

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Commodus (Joaquin Phoenix) takes power and strips rank from Maximus (Russell Crowe), one of the favored generals of his predecessor and father, Emperor Marcus Aurelius, the great stoical philosopher. Maximus is then relegated to fighting to the death in the gladiator arenas.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America.

programme.title: SAS: Red Notice
programme.desc: A man is caught up in a train hijacking, intended to blow up the Channel Tunnel. Sky Original film with Sam Heughan and Ruby Rose.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Gerard Butler plays the bodyguard tasked with saving the president when a North Korean mob storms the White House.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Tobey Maguire returns as the Webbed Wonder, battling evil in New York with Kirsten Dunst at his side. Action-packed superhero sequel.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson is the fearless warrior out to overthrow an evil warlord in ancient Egypt. Epic prequel to The Mummy Returns. Violence.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final..
programme.desc: ...Reckoning. Ethan Hunt and the team race to find the Entity as Tom Cruise stars in the franchise's last outing.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Super-powered action as Spidey (Tobey Maguire) battles his inner demons while Sandman and Venom plot to take him down. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence cause mayhem as they investigate a drug smuggling operation. Action. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Fire expert Jean-Claude Van Damme leaps into action when vicious terrorist Powers Boothe kidnaps the Vice President and threatens to vaporise a packed ice hockey stadium.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: King Arthur finds himself in danger of losing his wife Guinevere to the once-loyal Sir Lancelot. Medieval epic with Sean Connery, Richard Gere and Julia Ormond.

programme.title: Red Right Hand
programme.desc: When an honest man is forced back into the services of his town's kingpin, he learns to stop at nothing to protect his family. Action thriller starring Orlando Bloom.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Sci-fi action with Jason Statham, who must come face to face with a shark as he helps a research team stuck at the bottom of the Pacific.

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: The Holy Roman Empire where Europe's nations fiercely vie for supremacy and the Austrians, desiring more land, encroach upon Switzerland, a serene, pastoral nation.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson is the fearless warrior out to overthrow an evil warlord in ancient Egypt. Epic prequel to The Mummy Returns. Violence.

programme.title: Italian Job, The
programme.desc: Ex-convict Michael Caine hatches an audacious plan to steal $4 million, involving a bus, two Jaguars and, of course, three Mini Coopers. Comic adventure. Flashing images.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Super-powered action as Spidey (Tobey Maguire) battles his inner demons while Sandman and Venom plot to take him down. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum to bring glory back to Rome. BAFTA-nominated long-awaited sequel to Ridley Scott's historical epic.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: Down-on-his-luck suburban dentist Nicholas Oseransky is horrified to discover his new neighbour is a former hitman, who is now in hiding after turning evidence against gangland bosses. When his wife convinces him to contact the Mob to try to extort money in exchange for revealing the crook's location, Nicholas finds himself out of his depth and in mortal danger. Comedy, with Matthew Perry, Bruce W

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: A family tragedy woos Delia Deetz, daughter Lydia and rebellious teenage granddaughter Astrid back to the close-knit community of Winter River. Astrid accidentally opens a portal to the afterlife by summoning Beetlejuice three times. The mischievous demon ricochets between realms, wreaking havoc wherever he goes. Tim Burton's comedy sequel, starring Michael Keaton, Winona Ryder and Jenna Ortega.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Jack, a struggling musician, gets hit by a bus during a mysterious event. When he regains consciousness, he finds that he is the only person who can remember the Beatles, and sets out to exploit the opportunity by passing their hits off as his own compositions. Danny Boyle's comedy, starring Himesh Patel and Lily James.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: A professional relationship guru, who specialises in offering advice to lonely single men, helps an unlucky-in-love accountant to woo the girl of his dreams. However, when he finds himself falling for a beautiful gossip columnist, his usual charm abandons him and he discovers his expertise counts for nothing. Romantic comedy, with Will Smith, Eva Mendes, Kevin James, Amber Valletta, Julie Ann Emer

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: A failed rock star carves out a career as a popular wedding singer, but his hopes for a bright future are dashed when his fiancee jilts him at the altar and he tries to shut himself off from the outside world. At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barr

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: Dimwitted Rhode Island limousine driver Lloyd Christmas and his equally vacuous friend Harry Dunne embark on a disaster-fraught cross-country trip to Aspen, where they hope to reunite a briefcase with its female owner. However, the pair are unaware the case contains a $1million ransom they would have been better leaving well alone. Farrelly brothers comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Laure

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: After being taunted by relatives who think they will never have kids, married couple Pete and Ellie Wagner consider the option of adopting a child. However, they get more than they bargained for when they take in a rebellious teen and her two siblings. Director Sean Anders' comedy, starring Mark Wahlberg, Rose Byrne and Isabela Merced.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: An American counter-terrorism unit travels around the world on the lookout for threats to global peace, causing much destruction to major world cities in the process. The biggest current menace is North Korean leader Kim Jong-il and an organisation much closer to home - the Film Actors Guild. Satirical puppet comedy, voiced by South Park creators Trey Parker and Matt Stone.

programme.title: About Last Night
programme.desc: A couple are determined to leave Chicago's cut-throat singles scene behind them and develop a stable relationship together - despite their seemingly insurmountable commitment difficulties. Romantic drama based on the play by David Mamet, starring Demi Moore, Rob Lowe, James Belushi, George DiCenzo and Elizabeth Perkins.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: A family tragedy woos Delia Deetz, daughter Lydia and rebellious teenage granddaughter Astrid back to the close-knit community of Winter River. Astrid accidentally opens a portal to the afterlife by summoning Beetlejuice three times. The mischievous demon ricochets between realms, wreaking havoc wherever he goes. Tim Burton's comedy sequel, starring Michael Keaton, Winona Ryder and Jenna Ortega.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: Dimwitted Rhode Island limousine driver Lloyd Christmas and his equally vacuous friend Harry Dunne embark on a disaster-fraught cross-country trip to Aspen, where they hope to reunite a briefcase with its female owner. However, the pair are unaware the case contains a $1million ransom they would have been better leaving well alone. Farrelly brothers comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Laure

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: After being taunted by relatives who think they will never have kids, married couple Pete and Ellie Wagner consider the option of adopting a child. However, they get more than they bargained for when they take in a rebellious teen and her two siblings. Director Sean Anders' comedy, starring Mark Wahlberg, Rose Byrne and Isabela Merced.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer

At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barr

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A writer struggling to complete the script for a movie about psychopathic killers turns to his criminal friends for advice. He ends up getting more than he bargained for when the small-time crooks kidnap a dog that belongs to a gangster, putting all their lives in danger. Comedy thriller, starring Colin Farrell, Sam Rockwell, Christopher Walken and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughter's wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan,

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: It's five years since Sophie invited her three possible dads to her wedding, and now most of her family are reunited as she prepares for the grand reopening of the Hotel Bella Donna. Along the way, she learns more about her mother's past. Abba-themed musical sequel, starring Amanda Seyfried, Lily James, Pierce Brosnan, Cher and Andy Garcia.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Retired boxer Orlando Bloom returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut program first. Language/violence/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: Allied POWs are ready for a soccer match versus Germany in Nazi Paris, while French Resistance and British officers plot the team's daring escape to freedom.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: In turn of the century Vienna, royal rogue Rufus Sewell is enraged when, right before his eyes, gifted magician Ed Norton steals the heart of his fiancée. Elegant drama.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Tom Hanks carries this compelling Robinson Crusoe tale as the FedEx troubleshooter struggling to survive after he's marooned on a desert island. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: In WWII, while the men are on the battlefield, the women are on the playing field. Tom Hanks and Madonna star in a feelgood baseball tale.

programme.title: Quartet
programme.desc: A retirement home for former musicians is shaken up by the arrival of a renowned soprano. Heart-warming comedy with Maggie Smith.

programme.desc: Can baseball coach Brad Pitt and stat man Jonah Hill turn the struggling, cash-strapped Oakland 'A's into a top team? Drama with Philip Seymour Hoffman. Strong language.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. Years later, they meet again in a strangely sweet situation.(107 min).

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: Kenny Wormald and Julianne Hough bring dance back to the masses, much to the horror of preacher dad Dennis Quaid. Fun reboot. Moderate violence/sex/drug references.

programme.title: Anatomy Of A Murder
programme.desc: Semi-retired lawyer James Stewart takes on the dark case of an army lieutenant accused of murder. Gripping courtroom drama with Lee Remick.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: When a solitary writer adopts and bonds with a Great Dane that belonged to a late friend, she begins to come to terms with her past. Naomi Watts stars.

programme.desc: New girl Sandy causes a ruckus at Rydell High when stud Danny falls for her. Classic musical with John Travolta and the late Olivia Newton-John.

programme.title: Quartet
programme.desc: A retirement home for former musicians is shaken up by the arrival of a renowned soprano. Heart-warming comedy with Maggie Smith.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: When their enemy resurfaces after 16 years, a group of ex-revolutionaries reunite to rescue the daughter of one of their own.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls for a woman from a wealthy 18th-century family. Language/sex/mature themes/flashing images.

programme.desc: The Oscar-winning musical epic about the untold story of the Witches of Oz makes its debut on the big screen, starring Cynthia Erivo and Ariana Grande.

programme.desc: Elphaba, the Wicked Witch of the West, must reunite with Glinda the Good to transform herself - and Oz - for good.

programme.desc: Victor Fleming's Oscar-winning classic about a young girl, swept away from her home into the magical land of Oz. With Judy Garland, Ray Bolger and Bert Lahr.

programme.title: The Day Of The Jackal
programme.desc: When meticulous hitman Edward Fox is hired to kill the French president, detective Michael Lonsdale faces a race against time to track him down. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood is Harry Callahan, a maverick San Francisco cop out to trap a deranged killer known as Scorpio. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: CIA agent Harrison Ford becomes the target of an IRA revenge plot after he foils a terrorist attack. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Megastar singer Whitney Houston hires bodyguard Kevin Costner to protect her from a stalker. Oscar-nominated romantic drama.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Classy, pacy action thriller starring Harrison Ford as an innocent man on the run from a determined cop (Tommy Lee Jones).

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Veteran cop Danny Glover and maverick Mel Gibson team up to thwart drug-smugglers. Strong language/violence/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Rapid-fire action sequel with Mel Gibson and Danny Glover as the bickering cops closing the net on a mob of South African drug smugglers. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when he thought it was safe to get back in the water, Brody (Roy Scheider) must protect Amity Island from another marauding shark. Thriller. Flashing images.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: A Florida theme park has an unwelcome visitor: a Great White with a grudge. Tasty sequel with Dennis Quaid in for a short, shark shock! Violence/sex.

programme.title: Falling Down
programme.desc: Joel Schumacher's darkly comic thriller stars Michael Douglas as a laid-off worker who finally gets pushed too far. Strong language/violence/stereo sound only.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Wild-eyed Brooklyn bank robbers Al Pacino and John Cazale are forced to take hostages after a bungled heist. Oscar-winning crime drama. Contains strong language.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Classy, pacy action thriller starring Harrison Ford as an innocent man on the run from a determined cop (Tommy Lee Jones).

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: Young lawyer Tom Cruise becomes embroiled in his new firm's shady dealings. Sydney Pollack directs this gripping drama. Contains strong language and violence.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Rapid-fire action sequel with Mel Gibson and Danny Glover as the bickering cops closing the net on a mob of South African drug smugglers. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon III
programme.desc: Tough cops Riggs and Murtaugh (Mel Gibson and Danny Glover) return for another all-action adventure in which they must confront a former cop turned crime lord.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Mel Gibson and Danny Glover return to trade bullets with Triad kingpin Jet Li. Joe Pesci, Rene Russo and Chris Rock get in on the action. Strong language/violence.(122mins).

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleague's murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berko

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.
